scenario.name: depth-3-chain
scenario.description: Breaking with depth-3 transitive chain: auth.jwt loses expiresAt (breaking). api.GET/search and event.user-action flagged at depth 1. api.GET/recommendations flagged at depth 2. api.GET/trending (imports api.GET/recommendations) flagged at depth 3. Proves BFS traversal does not truncate beyond depth 2.
